channel.title: Ek Awaz News | ایک آواز نیوز
channel.description: Pakistan's most trusted news source. Breaking news, politics, sports, entertainment and more — ایک آواز نیوز | The Voice of Pakistan
channel.copyright: Copyright 2026 Ek Awaz Media Group. All rights reserved.

item.title: Pakistan Economy Grows at Record Pace in Q3 2026
item.description: The Pakistani economy has shown remarkable growth in the third quarter of 2026, with GDP expanding at a record pace driven by increased foreign investment and strong export performance.
item.dc:creator: Ek Awaz Staff

item.title: Senate Passes New Digital Security Bill with Unanimous Vote
item.description: The upper house of Pakistan's parliament passed comprehensive cybersecurity legislation designed to protect the nation's digital infrastructure and combat online threats.
item.dc:creator: Ek Awaz Staff

item.title: National Cricket Team Wins Asia Cup Series Against South Africa
item.description: Pakistan's national cricket team clinched a historic series victory against South Africa in a thrilling final match, cementing their position as Asia Cup champions.
item.dc:creator: Ek Awaz Staff
